detail.description: Agustín Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Felix Reyes. Liam Hicks to 2nd.

Agustín Ramírez singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. Otto Lopez scores.

Agustín Ramírez homers (2) on a line drive to center field.
Agustín Ramírez doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Greg Jones. Xavier Edwards scores.

Agustín Ramírez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Dane Myers. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.
Agustín Ramírez doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Will Benson. Xavier Edwards scores.
Agustín Ramírez doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Spencer Steer.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Agustín Ramírez triples (1) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Will Benson.
Agustín Ramírez doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Luisangel Acuña, deflected by right fielder Tristan Peters. Xavier Edwards to 3rd.
